summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of PARTYBOSS Partybusse (fleet) page redesign with SEO-optimized content. All 17 features tested and working correctly including H1, Quick Answer Block, comparison table with 10 buses sorted by capacity, category badges with color coding, occasion recommendations, standard equipment, detailed bus descriptions, bus grid, fleet FAQ, booking process, CTA, and Schema.org JSON-LD markup.
passed_tests: H1 displays 'Partybus Flotte Wien — 10 Partybusse von 8 bis 50 Personen'
Quick Answer Block renders with key fleet info (8-50 Personen)
Comparison table renders all 10 buses sorted by capacity (Crazybus VIII 8 Pers. first)
Comparison table shows columns: Bus Name, Kapazität, Kategorie, Besondere Ausstattung, Ideal für, Details
Category badges show correct color coding (Mini=green, Mittel=blue, Groß=purple, XL=orange, XXL=red)
Occasion recommendations section shows 4 cards: JGA, Firmenevents, Geburtstage, Hochzeiten
Each occasion card contains bus recommendations with internal links to bus detail pages
Standard equipment section shows 6 equipment items with icons
Detailed bus descriptions section renders all 10 buses with image, name, capacity, highlights, bestFor
Bus grid section renders all 10 BusCard components
Fleet FAQ section renders 7 questions specific to bus selection
Booking process shows 4 steps (Bus wählen, Anfrage senden, Angebot erhalten, Feiern!)
CTA at bottom with 'Jetzt unverbindlich anfragen' button and phone number
Schema.org JSON-LD ItemList with 10 Vehicle items present in page source
Schema.org JSON-LD FAQPage with 7 questions present in page source
Internal links from comparison table correctly navigate to bus detail pages
Internal links from occasion recommendations correctly navigate to bus detail pages
Bus detail pages work correctly with new data fields (shortName, number, category, capacityLabel, specialEquipment, detailDescription, bestFor)
critical_code_review_comments: React Router future flag warnings in console - consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags to Router configuration for future compatibility (non-blocking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partybusse page SEO redesign complete and working. All 10 buses display correctly with enhanced data fields (number, shortName, category, capacityLabel, specialEquipment, detailDescription, bestFor). Comparison table sorts buses by capacity ascending (Crazybus VIII 8 Pers. first, Dark Thunder VII 50 Pers. last). Schema.org JSON-LD markup (ItemList+Vehicle and FAQPage) is properly implemented. All internal links work correctly. Dark neon theme with glassmorphism effects rendering properly.

h1_header.text: PARTYBUS FLOTTE WIEN — 10 PARTYBUSSE VON 8 BIS 50 PERSONEN

quick_answer_block.content: 10 Partybusse für 8-50 Personen with key fleet info

bus_detail_pages.new_data_fields: shortName, number, category, capacityLabel, specialEquipment, detailDescription, bestFor
